response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (critical for client-facing insurance projects), and the resume reflects a senior/entrepreneurial profile inconsistent with an entry-level role requiring mentorship and structured growth.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but required for client collaboration
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, raising retention and role-fit risks
No visible Java project work despite Java being a core requirement
